reviews.review_description: Literally the absolute best VR drama I have seen. The drawing, the atmosphere, the slow - pace, making you take the time to be the confused, post-stroke father trapped within his thoughts unable to communicate. Honestly a masterful piece of work.

Awesome!
i love the art and everything its just amazing

The Effort and Love that went into this project is clear.

Wonderful!
So amazing to see VR used as artistic medium! Really well done, beautiful graphics and nice story. 100% recommended!

Incredible piece of art. Don't be thrown off by the black and white.... this short film has incredible depth and a tear jerker of an interactive story.  The scene where you are free falling from a plane and your parachute opens above you was mind blowing and will stay with me for some time... and this coming from someone who has almost 20 jumps from different aircrafts while serving in the military. Well done!! One of my favorite experiences on the Quest 3! Will highly recommend this experience to all. ❤️❤️🙏😁

reviews.review_title: The visual effect is truly remarkable
reviews.review_description: In conclusion, I can what story is trying to tell us, but each scene’s presentation lacks a certain level of clarity. Considering that it is offered free of charge, there is no significant downside, except for approximately 40 minutes of your time.

What an excellent experience.  It gives you a sense of what both sides feel while dealing with this condition.  Worth your time.  You def. need 40 minutes as there is no way to stop and start, but it's probably best consumed in one sitting for maximum effect.

Not a game, not an interactive film, but something new. This could have been done as a short story or a documentary but that would have robbed it of the unique way that we literally embody the narrator's father. I'm reminded of what Roger Ebert said about cinema, that it is a machine that generates empathy. Emperor shows us that this machine, too, can do the same.
I wish there was more stuff like this. Everyone must watch this, such a beautiful story.
